description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:6.11 Docker image with a cache of node_modules/. Define three stages: lint, test, compile. Add a lint job in the lint stage that runs npm i then npm run lint. Add a test job in the test stage that runs npm i then npm run test. Add a compile job (named comile) in the compile stage that runs npm i then npm run build, with no artifacts, services, or special rules.
